bonuses.stat: When your healing critically strikes or when you critically damage a target, spawn a ball of Hemoglobin at their location. After 2 seconds the ball explodes, restoring 40-1750 Magicka and applying Minor Vitality to you and your group members within 6 meters of the ball for 9 seconds, increasing their healing received and damage shield strength by 6%. This effect can occur once every 9 seconds.
